headline: Velotic™ Launches to Shape Future of Industrial & Manufacturing Software
summary: BOSTON, March 17, 2026--Velotic™ today announced its launch as a leading independent industrial software company, uniting multiple trusted platforms to advance a new era for industrial and manufacturing technology. The formation of Velotic coincides with the closings of TPG’s previously announced acquisitions of Proficy, the former manufacturing software business of GE Vernova, and PTC’s former industrial connectivity and Internet of Things (IoT) businesses. headline: 2026 Just Capital rankings: How corporate America is investing in post-ESG era
summary: The 2026 Just Capital rankings are topped by Hewlett Packard, followed by Union Pacific, Hewlett Packard Enterprise, Dow and S&P Global.
